FlavourText.original:
My Soul is your Strength
My Price is your Blood
FlavourText.zh_cn:
我的灵魂将引导你勇闯天涯，
但是必须以命脉做为代价。
FlavourText.zh_tw:
我的靈魂將引導你勇闖天涯，
但是必須以鮮血做為代價。

group.original: {0}% of [Spell|Spell] Damage [Leeched as Life|Leeched as Life]

translation.zh_cn: [Spell|法术]伤害的 {0}% 转化为[Leeched as Life|生命偷取]
translation.zh_tw: [Spell|法術]傷害的 {0}% 轉化為[Leeched as Life|生命偷取]

group.original: Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to {0}% of Base Mana Cost

translation.zh_cn: 技能获得等于基础魔力消耗 {0}% 的基础生命消耗
translation.zh_tw: 技能獲得等同 {0}% 基礎魔力消耗的基礎生命消耗
增加 {0}% 生命消耗[Efficiency|效率]

group.original: Regenerate {0}% of maximum Life per second
